name: Migrate Database
description: Plan and execute a safe database migration: schema changes, data transformation, rollback plan, and zero-downtime deployment

steps.name: Audit Current Schema
steps.description: Document the current schema: all tables, columns, types, indexes, constraints, and foreign keys. Identify which tables are large, frequently written to, or have complex dependencies.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Current schema fully documented, large/hot tables identified, dependency graph understood

steps.name: Design Target Schema
steps.description: Define the target state. Write the migration SQL or schema diff. Identify data transformations needed, columns to drop, and constraints to add.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Target schema defined, migration SQL written, data transformation logic planned

steps.name: Write Rollback Plan
steps.description: For every migration step, write the undo operation. Test that rollback SQL is valid. Identify any destructive operations (DROP COLUMN) that cannot be rolled back and plan accordingly.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Rollback script written for every migration step, destructive operations flagged with manual recovery plan

steps.name: Test Migration on Staging
steps.description: Run the migration against a staging database with production-like data volume. Measure execution time, lock duration, and row counts. Verify data integrity after migration.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Migration runs cleanly on staging, execution time measured, data counts match before/after

steps.name: Coordinate Zero-Downtime Deploy
steps.description: Plan the deployment order: expand (add new columns), migrate (backfill data), contract (remove old columns). Deploy app code that handles both old and new schema during transition.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Deployment plan written with expand/migrate/contract phases, app code handles dual-schema period

steps.name: Execute & Verify
steps.description: Run the migration on production. Monitor for errors, lock contention, and replication lag. Verify row counts and data spot-checks after each phase. Keep rollback ready.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Migration executed successfully, data integrity verified, no unexpected locks or errors, rollback not needed
